mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN billing_cycle = '1M' THEN price WHEN billing_cycle = '1Y' AND MONTH(start_date) = MONTH(#{monthStart}) THEN price ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM add_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= #{monthStart})

SELECT pay_day AS payDay, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, GROUP_CONCAT(item_name ORDER BY item_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS itemNames FROM ( SELECT LEAST(DAY(a.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(#{monthStart}))) AS pay_day, s.item_name AS item_name, a.price AS amount FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.billing_cycle = '1M' AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart})
UNION ALL
SELECT LEAST(DAY(a.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(#{monthStart}))) AS pay_day, s.item_name AS item_name, a.price AS amount FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.billing_cycle = '1Y' AND MONTH(a.start_date) = #{month} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) ) t GROUP BY pay_day ORDER BY pay_day

SELECT a.subscription_id AS subscriptionId, s.item_name AS itemName, a.price AS price, LEAST(DAY(a.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(#{monthStart}))) AS billingDay, pm.custom_card_company AS customCardCompany, c.card_company AS cardCompany FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id LEFT JOIN payment_method pm ON a.payment_id = pm.payment_id LEFT JOIN card c ON pm.card_id = c.card_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND LEAST(DAY(a.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(#{monthStart}))) = #{date} AND ( ( a.billing_cycle = '1M' AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) ) OR ( a.billing_cycle = '1Y' AND MONTH(a.start_date) = #{month} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) ) ) ORDER BY s.item_name

SELECT c.category_name AS categoryName, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN a.price WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN FLOOR(a.price / 12) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, GROUP_CONCAT(s.item_name ORDER BY s.item_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS itemNames FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT c.category_name AS categoryName, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN a.price WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN FLOOR(a.price / 12) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS subscriptionCount FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT c.category_name AS categoryName, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN a.price * 12 WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN a.price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS subscriptionCount FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.start_date < #{nextYearStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{yearStart}) GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT a.payment_id AS paymentId, s.item_name AS subscriptionName, sc.category_name AS categoryName, COALESCE(p.card_name, c.card_company, p.custom_card_company, '등록 카드') AS paymentCardName, CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN FLOOR(a.price / 12) ELSE a.price END AS paymentAmount, CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN '연간 구독(월 환산)' ELSE '매월 구독' END AS displayDateLabel, CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isYearly FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id JOIN subscription_category sc ON s.category_id = sc.category_id LEFT JOIN payment_method p ON a.payment_id = p.payment_id LEFT JOIN card c ON p.card_id = c.card_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.item_name ASC
